site.name: QR Photo App
site.og_image_alt: Guests scanning a QR code and uploading photos at an event
footer.tagline: QR-powered photo collection for any event — guests scan, snap and upload. No app, no account.
landing.title: Collect every photo of your event — with one QR code
landing.meta_description: Create photo prompts for your event, print them as QR cards or a poster, and let guests upload their shots straight from their phone. No app, no account.
landing.hero.subtitle: Set up photo prompts, print the QR codes, and watch the gallery fill up while you celebrate. Guests just scan and upload — no app, no sign-up.
landing.hero.note: Free to try — no credit card needed
landing.how.title: Three steps to a full gallery
landing.how.step1.title: Create your prompts
landing.how.step1.text: Name your event and add the photo tasks you want guests to capture — or start from our suggestions.
landing.how.step2.title: Print & place the QR codes
landing.how.step2.text: Download print-ready cards or a poster, and place them on tables, at the bar, by the entrance.
landing.how.step3.title: Guests scan & upload
landing.how.step3.text: Every scan opens the upload page in the phone's browser. Photos land in your gallery instantly.
landing.features.title: Built for real events
landing.features.f1.title: No app, no account
landing.features.f1.text: Guests scan a QR code and upload straight from the browser. Zero friction, so everyone joins in.
landing.features.f2.title: Print-ready design
landing.features.f2.text: Cards and posters come as polished PDFs in your chosen palette — print them at home or at any shop.
landing.features.f3.title: One gallery, all photos
landing.features.f3.text: Every upload lands in your private gallery, organised by prompt, in full resolution.
landing.features.f4.title: Download everything
landing.features.f4.text: Grab the whole gallery as a ZIP after the event — the originals, not compressed copies.
landing.faq.title: Questions, answered
landing.faq.q1: Do my guests need to install anything?
landing.faq.a1: No. Scanning the QR code opens a web page where they pick a photo and upload it. It works on any phone with a camera and a browser.
landing.faq.a2: Yes — the free plan includes up to %d prompts per event and one photo per prompt. Paid plans unlock unlimited photos per prompt, guest downloads and more.
landing.faq.a3: You do, in your private gallery. Guests with the QR link can browse what's been captured so far — and you can turn guest downloads off at any time.
landing.faq.a4: Photos stay available for months after your event — long enough to collect, download and share everything at your own pace.
landing.final.title: Ready when you are
landing.final.subtitle: Set up your event in a few minutes — pay only if you need more.
landing.final.note: Free plan available. No credit card required.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.meta_description: Simple one-time pricing. Start free, upgrade when your event grows.
pricing.hero_title: One event, one price. No subscription.
pricing.hero_subtitle: Start free and see how it works. Upgrade once, use it for your whole event.
pricing.free_note: Try it out — no credit card
pricing.support_body: Write us — we answer fast, usually the same day.
pricing.faq.a1: No. You pay once and your plan applies to your account — no recurring charges.
pricing.faq.a2: Yes. The free plan is a fully working event with a smaller prompt limit. Upgrade any time and your event keeps everything you set up.
pricing.faq.q3: What does the free plan include?
pricing.faq.a3: Up to %d prompts per event, print-ready QR cards and poster, and one photo per prompt.
pricing.faq.q4: How many prompts can I add?
pricing.faq.a4: Standard allows %d prompts per event, Premium %d. Most events use far fewer.
pricing.faq.a5: Your account is upgraded within seconds. All paid features unlock immediately for every event you own.
pricing.faq.a6: If you haven't used it for your event yet, you get your money back within 14 days — just send us an email.
create.title: Create your event
create.meta_description: Set up your event photo challenge in minutes: add prompts, pick a design, print your QR codes.
create.hero_subtitle: Add your photo prompts, pick a look, and you're ready to print.
create.event.title: Your event
create.event.date_hint: Shown on printed material — leave empty to omit.
create.prompts.title: Photo prompts
create.prompts.subtitle: What should your guests capture? Every prompt becomes its own QR code (or one shared code hands them out one by one).
create.prompts.empty: No prompts yet — add your first one below.
create.starters.title: Need inspiration?
create.starters.subtitle: Tap to add a starter prompt — edit the list any time.
create.starters.p1: A group photo of your table
create.starters.p2: The dance floor at its peak
create.starters.p6: The most beautiful detail of the venue
create.starters.p7: A photo with someone you just met
create.starters.p8: The food that deserves a photo
create.design.title: Pick a look
create.design.subtitle: The palette themes your printed cards, poster and the guest pages.
create.qr_mode.title: How do you want to hand out prompts?
create.qr_mode.subtitle: You can switch modes later at any time.
create.qr_mode.option_cards_hint: A printable deck — place one card per table or spot. Each card has its own QR code.
create.qr_mode.option_single_hint: A single poster QR — each scan hands the guest the next prompt automatically.
create.limit.warning: Your plan allows up to %d prompts.
create.errors.event_name: Please enter a name for your event.
create.errors.prompts_empty: Add at least one prompt before continuing.
create.errors.prompts_too_many: That's more prompts than your plan allows.
create.actions.note: You'll create a free account in the next step so your event is saved.
create.upgrade_error.title: Prompt limit reached
create.upgrade_error.message: Your plan allows up to %d prompts per event. Upgrade to add more.
edit.title: Edit your event
edit.heading: Edit your event
events.title: My events
events.heading: My events
overview.title: Event overview
overview.meta_description: Manage your event: prompts, design, QR codes and settings.
overview.plan.label: Plan:
overview.upgrade.title: Unlock the full experience
overview.upgrade.subtitle: One payment, no subscription — everything unlocks instantly.
overview.upgrade.benefit_qr_download: Bare QR downloads for DIY material
overview.prompts.title: Your prompts
overview.design.title: Design
overview.design.explain: The palette themes your printed material and the guest pages.
overview.language.title: Event language
overview.language.explain: The language your guests see when they scan a QR code, and the language of your printed material.
overview.language.label: Language
overview.language.hint: Applies to guest pages and print PDFs.
overview.qr_mode.title: Distribution mode
overview.qr_mode.explain: How guests receive their prompts. Switching is free and instant — reprint your material afterwards.
overview.qr_mode.option_cards_hint: A printable deck with one QR code per prompt.
overview.qr_mode.option_single_hint: A single poster QR — each scan hands out the next prompt.
overview.qr_mode.download_hint: Prefer to design your own cards or signs? Download the bare QR codes.
overview.qr_mode.download_locked: Bare QR downloads are part of the paid plans.
overview.settings.title: Guest settings
overview.settings.lock_after_submit_hint: After submitting, a guest's phone is locked to the gallery — good for contests.
overview.settings.disable_guest_download: Guests can browse the gallery but not download it as a ZIP.
overview.settings.guest_download_locked: Guest downloads are part of the paid plans.
overview.settings.collect_guest_name_hin: Adds a required name field to the upload form so you can see who took each photo.
overview.support.title: Need help?
overview.support.body: Questions about printing, prompts or anything else — we're happy to help.
overview.danger.title: Delete event
overview.danger.explain: Removes the event with all its prompts and photos. This cannot be undone.
overview.danger.confirm: Delete this event and all its photos? This cannot be undone.
qr_download.locked.title: Upgrade to download QR files
qr_download.locked.message: Bare QR code downloads are part of the paid plans. Your printable PDF is always free.
gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.meta_description: All photos uploaded to your event.
gallery.empty.title: No photos yet
gallery.empty.body: Share your QR codes with guests — uploads will appear here instantly.
gallery.delete_confirm: Delete this photo? This cannot be undone.
challenge.title: Your photo mission
challenge.meta_description: Scan, snap and upload your photo.
upload.title: Upload your photo
upload.meta_description: Upload your photo for this prompt.
upload.not_found: This event could not be found.
upload.error.bad_format: That file type isn't supported — please choose a photo.
upload.error.too_large: That photo is too large — the limit is 50 MB.
upload.error.single_photo_limit: This prompt already has a photo. On the free plan each prompt holds one photo — browse the gallery to see it.
library.title: Event gallery
library.meta_description: Browse all photos captured so far.
library.tap_upload: Tap a prompt to add your photo
library.empty: Nothing here yet — be the first to upload!
library.already_submitted: Thanks — you've already submitted your photo!
library.lightbox.title: Photo view

done.heading: Nice shot!
done.text: Your photo is in the gallery.

login.error.google_unavailable: Google sign-in isn't available right now — use email and password instead.

login.error.google_unverified: Your Google account's email address is not verified.
login.notice.reset_sent: If that address has an account, a reset email is on its way.

register.heading: Create your free account
register.error.email_taken: That email is already registered — try logging in.
register.error.short_password: Please choose a password with at least 8 characters.
register.error.invalid_email: That email address doesn't look right.

forgot_password.heading: Reset your password
forgot_password.help: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot_password.notice.sent: If that address has an account, a reset email is on its way.
payment_success.title: Payment received
payment_success.active.heading: You're all set!
payment_success.active.subtitle: Your upgrade is active — all features are unlocked.
payment_success.pending.heading: Payment received
payment_success.pending.subtitle: We're activating your upgrade.
payment_success.pending.body_auth: This usually takes a few seconds. Refresh this page or head to your events.
payment_success.pending.body_anon: Log in with the account you purchased with to see your upgraded plan.
